message:
feat(command,store): XPENDING IDLE option support (Redis 6.2+)

XPENDING extended form now parses the optional IDLE min-idle-time
parameter: XPENDING key group [IDLE min-idle-time] start end count [consumer]

- Argument parsing handles both 6/7-arg (no IDLE) and 8/9-arg (with IDLE) forms
- xpending_entries gains min_idle_ms parameter for idle time filtering
- Entries with idle time below the threshold are excluded from results

Closes: frankenredis-fnf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
